critical_notes:

- Gross margin at 28.6% is 5.4 pts below L3M average — margin compression

- 25 customers have cross-sell opportunities across product categories

- 270 orders placed in L3M (avg $13,037 per order)
- 30 new customers acquired in L3M: Ace Bus Charter, Brake & Truck Supply, Canyon State Bus Sales
- L3M order volume (270) is above L12M quarterly average (204)
- Order backlog of $1,213,202 across 42 orders (avg age: 57 days)
- 7 orders (17%) are over 90 days old — potential delivery risk
- $625,377 (52%) of backlog expected to ship within 30 days
